source:
# 第6章 金融时间序列分析
对应正文 book/part2/06-time-series.md。依赖内置数据，离线可跑。
先执行 uv run python scripts/make_sample_data.py

import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd, matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from scipy import stats
from scipy.stats import norm
from statsmodels.tsa.stattools import adfuller, kpss
from statsmodels.graphics.tsaplots import plot_acf, plot_pacf
from statsmodels.tsa.arima.model import ARIMA
from statsmodels.stats.diagnostic import acorr_ljungbox, het_arch
from arch import arch_model
from fds import load_sample_prices, daily_returns, set_chinese_font
set_chinese_font()
prices = load_sample_prices()
log_rets = daily_returns(prices, log=True)
ticker = "TECH"; price_series = prices[ticker]; ret_series = log_rets[ticker].dropna(); ret_sq = ret_series ** 2
print(f"价格维度：{prices.shape}")
print(ret_series.describe().round(6))
## 6.2 平稳性直观：价格 vs 收益率
价格有明显趋势（非平稳），对数收益率均值接近零（近似平稳）。

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(14, 8))
fig.suptitle("TECH：价格 vs 对数收益率", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold")
price_series.plot(ax=axes[0,0], color="steelblue", lw=1)
axes[0,0].set_title("价格（非平稳：有明显趋势）")
axes[0,0].axhline(price_series.mean(), color="red", ls="--", alpha=0.7, label=f"均值={price_series.mean():.0f}")
axes[0,0].legend(fontsize=8)
ret_series.plot(ax=axes[0,1], color="darkorange", lw=0.8, alpha=0.8)
axes[0,1].set_title("对数收益率（近似平稳）")
axes[0,1].axhline(0, color="red", ls="--", alpha=0.7)
axes[1,0].hist(price_series, bins=40, color="steelblue", alpha=0.7)
axes[1,0].set_title("价格分布（右偏）")
axes[1,1].hist(ret_series, bins=50, color="darkorange", alpha=0.7, density=True)
xr = np.linspace(ret_series.min(), ret_series.max(), 200)
axes[1,1].plot(xr, norm.pdf(xr, ret_series.mean(), ret_series.std()), "k--", lw=1.5, label="正态拟合")
axes[1,1].set_title("收益率分布（厚尾）")
axes[1,1].legend(fontsize=8)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

## 6.3 单位根检验：ADF 与 KPSS
- ADF：H0=单位根；p<0.05 → 平稳
- KPSS：H0=平稳；p<0.05 → 非平稳

q1,q5 = "1%","5%"
def run_adf(s, name):
    r = adfuller(s, autolag="AIC")
    stat, pval, crit = r[0], r[1], r[4]
    print(f"[ADF] {name}: stat={stat:.3f}, p={pval:.5f}, 结论={chr(45).join(["平稳" if pval<0.05 else "非平稳"])}")
    print(f"  临界值: 1%={crit[q1]:.3f}, 5%={crit[q5]:.3f}")
def run_kpss(s, name):
    stat, pval, _, _ = kpss(s, regression="c", nlags="auto")
    print(f"[KPSS] {name}: stat={stat:.3f}, 结论={chr(45).join(["非平稳" if pval<=0.05 else "平稳"])}")
log_price = np.log(price_series)
run_adf(log_price, "TECH 对数价格"); run_kpss(log_price, "TECH 对数价格")
run_adf(ret_series, "TECH 对数收益率"); run_kpss(ret_series, "TECH 对数收益率")
print("结论: 价格存在单位根，收益率平稳 → d=0")

## 6.4 ACF / PACF 图（定阶工具）
| 模型 | ACF | PACF |
|------|-----|------|
| AR(p) | 拖尾 | 截尾 |
| MA(q) | 截尾 | 拖尾 |
| ARMA | 拖尾 | 拖尾 |

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(14, 8))
fig.suptitle("收益率：ACF 与 PACF（定阶参考）", fontsize=13, fontweight="bold")
plot_acf(ret_series, lags=30, ax=axes[0,0], title="ACF — 日对数收益率", alpha=0.05)
plot_pacf(ret_series, lags=30, ax=axes[0,1], title="PACF — 日对数收益率", method="ywm", alpha=0.05)
plot_acf(ret_sq, lags=30, ax=axes[1,0], title="ACF — 收益率平方（波动率代理）", alpha=0.05)
plot_pacf(ret_sq, lags=30, ax=axes[1,1], title="PACF — 收益率平方", method="ywm", alpha=0.05)
for ax in axes.flat: ax.set_xlabel("滞后阶 h")
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
print("收益率平方 ACF 多阶显著 → 波动率聚集")
H0：前 m 阶自相关均为零（白噪声）。p<0.05 则序列有自相关结构。

lb_ret = acorr_ljungbox(ret_series, lags=[5,10,15,20], return_df=True)
lb_sq = acorr_ljungbox(ret_sq, lags=[5,10,15,20], return_df=True)
print("对数收益率 Ljung-Box：")
print(lb_ret.round(4).to_string())
print("
收益率平方 Ljung-Box（ARCH效应检测）：")
print(lb_sq.round(4).to_string())
print("
收益率平方 p 值极小 → 波动率有显著自相关（ARCH效应）")
## 6.6 ARIMA 定阶：AIC/BIC 网格搜索
遍历所有 (p,q) 组合，选出使 AIC 最小的模型。

pmax, qmax = 3, 3
aic_grid = np.full((pmax+1, qmax+1), np.nan)
bic_grid = np.full((pmax+1, qmax+1), np.nan)
for p in range(pmax+1):
    for q in range(qmax+1):
        if p==0 and q==0: continue
        try:
            res = ARIMA(ret_series, order=(p,0,q)).fit()
            aic_grid[p,q] = res.aic; bic_grid[p,q] = res.bic
        except: pass
best_idx_aic = np.unravel_index(np.nanargmin(aic_grid), aic_grid.shape)
best_p_aic, best_q_aic = best_idx_aic
print(f"AIC 最优: ARIMA({best_p_aic}, 0, {best_q_aic}), AIC={aic_grid[best_idx_aic]:.2f}")
best_idx_bic = np.unravel_index(np.nanargmin(bic_grid), bic_grid.shape)
best_p_bic, best_q_bic = best_idx_bic
print(f"BIC 最优: ARIMA({best_p_bic}, 0, {best_q_bic}), BIC={bic_grid[best_idx_bic]:.2f}")
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))
for ax, grid, title, bi in [(axes[0],aic_grid,"AIC",best_idx_aic),(axes[1],bic_grid,"BIC",best_idx_bic)]:
    im = ax.imshow(grid, cmap="YlOrRd_r", aspect="auto")
    ax.set_xticks(range(qmax+1)); ax.set_yticks(range(pmax+1))
    ax.set_xticklabels([f"q={q}" for q in range(qmax+1)])
    ax.set_yticklabels([f"p={p}" for p in range(pmax+1)])
    ax.set_title(f"ARIMA(p,0,q) {title} 热力图"); plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax)
    ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((bi[1]-0.5,bi[0]-0.5),1,1,fill=False,edgecolor="blue",lw=2.5))
    ax.text(bi[1],bi[0],"最优",ha="center",va="center",fontsize=10,color="blue",fontweight="bold")
plt.suptitle("收益率 ARIMA 阶数选择（蓝色框=最优）", fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
